item.nmbct-football.goal_net_connector.t: Right-click goal net anchors to select 4 points and create a net
Right-click a net to adjust slack; left-click resets, sneak + left-click destroys; sneak + right-click air clears points
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.duplicat: This anchor is already selected, pick another
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.reset: Goal net reset to its initial state
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.not: The 4 anchors are not on one horizontal or vertical plane
The 4 anchors do not form a rectangle
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.siz: Goal net size out of range (both width and height must be between 2 and 16 blocks)
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.inv: Selected block is not a valid goal net anchor
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.not: Not enough string; 8 required to create a goal net (1 wool counts as 4)
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.no_: Goal net connector is out of durability
Hold a goal net connector in your hand
message.nmbct-football.goal_net.fail.adv: Cannot destroy goal nets with the connector in Adventure mode
hud.nmbct-football.hint.title: Football Controls
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.boost: Toggle: press once while sprinting; Hold: keep key held
hud.nmbct-football.kickoff_lock.waiting: ⚠ Kicks locked. Waiting for kickoff decision.
hud.nmbct-football.kickoff_lock.wait_tou: ⚠ Kicks locked. Waiting for kickoff touch.
hud.nmbct-football.goal.headline: GOAL
hud.nmbct-football.invalid_goal.headline: NO GOAL
command.nmbct-football.config.player_onl: Only players can open the config screen
command.nmbct-football.config.opened: Opened server football config (saved changes sync to server)
command.nmbct-football.kick.not_a_footba: Selected entity is not a football
command.nmbct-football.kick.zero_directi: Kick point and toward target cannot be the same
Without entity: search nearest football within command_kick_range of execution position
Impulse magnitude, default 1.0 (~+0.4 blocks/tick at force=1)
Launch angle above execution-facing horizontal plane (deg); 0=horizontal, default 0
Kick point: ball center offset one radius opposite execution-facing horizontal; respects execute positioned/rotated
command.nmbct-football.kick.help.precise: World kick point (~ ^ supported; affected by execute at/positioned/rotated)
Direction reference point; direction = normalize(toward − at); must differ from at
Impulse magnitude (vector length); independent of toward distance
Calls physics kick directly; no extra look-pitch offset
command.nmbct-football.match.leave_not_i: You are not in any team
command.nmbct-football.dev.ball_indicato: Football position indicator enabled (nearest ball, dev)
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.title: NMBCT Football · Client
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.title: NMBCT Football · Server
Define the goal mouth with two corner points and a facing vector. Use shortcut buttons to set corners from your position.
Outfield spawn list. Add or remove entries; each has position and facing. Use "Use my position" inside an entry when needed.
World X coordinate for this spawn.
World Y coordinate (height) for this spawn.
World Z coordinate for this spawn.
Vertical pitch in degrees when spawning.
Sideline runs along Z; the coord value is on the X axis.
Sideline runs along X; the coord value is on the Z axis.
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.hint_: Reserved option for extra hint-distance buffering. Not wired into runtime hint checks yet.
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.rende: Use vanilla interpolation below this speed
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.clien: Smooth correction when local vs synced velocity differs
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.ball_: Unit: blocks. Football is not rendered beyond this distance, helping reduce far-entity render cost.
Range: 0~1. Billboard switch distance = max render distance × this ratio. Lower values switch to billboard earlier.
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.client.goal_: Auto switches render mode based on whether an Iris shader pack is active. Choose Shader Compatible or Vanilla Compatible manually if Auto does not look correct.
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.stami: Ticks at full dive charge before continuous drain starts
Stamina drained per second while holding full dive charge
One-time stamina cost when dribble key cancels dive charge
Stamina removed when slide starts; minimum stamina to begin
Additional stamina removed during slide (up to max total)
Upper bound for entry + sustain stamina on one slide
Sprint stamina drain multiplier while boost sprint is active
Extra speed multiplier on top of stamina tiers while boost sprint is active
Drain per second while sprinting with forward input
Recovery starts after this many seconds since last drain; converted to ticks ×20
Stamina restored per second after the delay
Fraction of max stamina restored at half-time (0–1)
Fraction of max stamina restored after a goal (0–1)

Upper stamina ratio thresholds and speed multipliers. If current ratio is strictly below a threshold, that tier applies. Full stamina is 1.0 when no 100% tier exists. Tiers must be unique; multipliers non-decreasing as threshold increases
0–1: tier applies when current stamina/max is below this value
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.playe: Seconds after slide ends before another slide is allowed
Minimum ticks a slide lasts; early end can be requested after this
Ticks at full initial speed before decay begins
Ticks to linearly decay speed to zero after the hold phase
Fraction of horizontal speed kept when slide ends (0 = none)
Consecutive sprint ticks required before slide can start
Multiplier on tackler speed after hitting a player (lower = more damp)
Horizontal push speed applied to tackled players
Ticks victim movement is damped after tackle
Per-tick horizontal velocity multiplier while resisted
Ticks victim cannot jump after tackle
Ball contact grace ticks while sliding
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.physi: Collision radius
Ball collision radius (blocks), matches entity half-width
Mass
Used for impulse → velocity: Δv = impulse / mass
Gravity
Gravity subtracted from vertical velocity per tick (blocks/tick²)
Air drag
Linear velocity multiplier per tick while airborne (0–1)
Spin air drag
Angular velocity multiplier per tick while airborne (0–1)
Ground friction
Horizontal velocity multiplier per tick on ground; lower = faster stop
Roll coupling
How fast linear and angular velocity match rolling (0–1)
Ground restitution
Vertical bounce factor on ground (0–1); higher = bouncier
Wall restitution
Normal velocity factor after wall hit (0–1)
Wall spin retention
Fraction of spin kept after wall bounce (0–1)
Wall bounce cooldown
Ticks to skip roll coupling after a wall bounce
Ground settle speed
Downward speed below this is zeroed instead of bouncing
Cobweb horizontal drag
Horizontal velocity multiplier per tick in cobwebs
Kick force scale
Scales kick command/action force into physics impulse
Moving kick lateral damp
Retained lateral fraction of old velocity when re-kicking (0–1)
Orientation reset Δv
Reset render orientation if linear velocity change exceeds this
Orientation reset Δω
Reset render orientation if angular velocity change exceeds this
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.playe: Max horizontal distance to kick the ball (blocks)
Shoot force at minimum charge release
Minimum ticks between football actions per player
Press shorter than this counts as a tap
Hold this long to start charging shoot/throw
Time from charge start to peak force
Narrow window at peak force for maximum power
After the perfect window, force eases toward 60% with slowing decay; this is the exponential time constant
Random direction offset for R-key pass/shoot/throw; same scale as vanilla projectile inaccuracy (0 = none)
Force multiplier when releasing in the perfect window (1.0 = none); perfect releases skip direction spread
Target point ahead of player feet while dribbling (blocks)
End dribble session beyond this distance (blocks)
End session if no dribble heartbeat for this many ticks
Position error → velocity correction (PD P term)
Optional light touch on session start; 0 = disabled
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.goalk: Above this speed, catch fails — punch or dive instead
Auto-drop ball after this many ticks
Ticks after catch before throw/drop allowed; 0 = off
No catch recoil below this ball speed (blocks/tick)
Look down past this angle (deg) for grounded dive
Look-up effect maxes out at this angle (deg)
Max jump height multiplier vs level view when looking up
Min forward distance multiplier vs level view when looking up
Jump height multiplier for grounded dive (0 = no jump)
Forward distance multiplier for steep down / grounded dive
Vertical speed during grounded dive (blocks/tick; negative = down)
Force when goalkeeper punches the ball
yacl3.config.nmbct-football.server.parti: Base kick particle count; more added with force
Show high-speed trail above this speed (blocks/tick)
screen.nmbct-football.match.title: Match Setup
screen.nmbct-football.field.title: Field Settings
screen.nmbct-football.match.tab.teams.de: Display names for both teams (HUD, kickoff banners, final result).
screen.nmbct-football.match.tab.timing.d: Regular match duration, stoppage time, and ball reset delay after goals or touchline outs.
screen.nmbct-football.match.tab.extra.de: Extra time and penalty shootout when the match is tied.
screen.nmbct-football.match.tab.accessib: Optional assistive features for match participants.
screen.nmbct-football.match.enable_footb: During play, participants see off-screen ball direction anywhere within the pitch rectangle expanded by 64 blocks (not only while dribbling).
Name shown for Team A in UI and messages.
Name shown for Team B in UI and messages.
screen.nmbct-football.match.half_time_mi: Length of each regular half in minutes (excludes stoppage and extra time).
screen.nmbct-football.match.enable_stopp: When enabled, halves can enter stoppage time up to the max below.
screen.nmbct-football.match.stoppage_tim: Maximum stoppage minutes per half; actual time is decided by match logic within this cap.
screen.nmbct-football.match.post_goal_ba: Seconds to wait after a goal or touchline out before placing the ball at kickoff or the restart spot. 0 = immediate.
screen.nmbct-football.match.enable_extra: Play extra time if the score is tied after regular time.
screen.nmbct-football.match.extra_time_h: Minutes per half during extra time.
screen.nmbct-football.match.enable_penal: If still tied after extra time, enter a penalty shootout phase.
Set goal corner 1 to your current position (writes X/Y/Z).
Set goal corner 2 to your current position (writes X/Y/Z).
screen.nmbct-football.field.use_current_: Fill the coordinates above from where you are standing (and facing when applicable).
Fill position and view angles from where you are standing.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.corne: World position (X, Y, Z) of goal A corner 1.
World position (X, Y, Z) of goal A corner 2.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.facin: Goal A facing vector (X, Y, Z) for goal-line checks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.gk_po: World position for team A goal kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.penal: World position where the ball is placed for team A penalty shootout kicks at this goal.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.cl_po: World position for team A left corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.cr_po: World position for team A right corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.corne: World position of goal B corner 1.
World position of goal B corner 2.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.facin: Goal B facing vector (X, Y, Z).
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.gk_po: World position for team B goal kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.penal: World position where the ball is placed for team B penalty shootout kicks at this goal.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.cl_po: World position for team B left corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.cr_po: World position for team B right corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_a.gk_s: Team A goalkeeper spawn position and facing.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_b.gk_s: Team B goalkeeper spawn position and facing.
screen.nmbct-football.field.kick_off.pos: Ball placement for kick-off and resets.
screen.nmbct-football.field.gk_kick_head: World position where the ball is placed for this team's goal kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.penalty_spot: Penalty shootout ball placement at this goal. If unset, defaults to 11 blocks infield from the goal line.
screen.nmbct-football.field.cl_kick_head: World position for this team's left corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.cr_kick_head: World position for this team's right corner kicks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.gk_header.de: Where the goalkeeper is teleported on kickoff or resets, including facing.
screen.nmbct-football.field.plr_header.d: Outfield spawn points; players are placed here on match or half kickoff.
screen.nmbct-football.field.tab.kick_off: Center spot used for kickoff and many ball resets after goals.
screen.nmbct-football.field.sideline.coo: Coordinate on the chosen axis: X value if axis is X, Z value if axis is Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.sideline.axi: Which world axis the touchline runs along, together with coord for out-of-bounds checks.
screen.nmbct-football.field.sideline.ins: When enabled, the positive direction on that axis is inside the pitch; otherwise the negative side is inside.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.x1.de: Team A goal corner 1 world X (with Y1/Z1 defines one post).
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.y1.de: Team A goal corner 1 world Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.z1.de: Team A goal corner 1 world Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.x2.de: Team A goal corner 2 world X (opposite corner of the mouth).
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.y2.de: Team A goal corner 2 world Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.z2.de: Team A goal corner 2 world Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.fx.de: Team A goal mouth normal vector X (goal-line detection).
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.fy.de: Team A goal mouth normal vector Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_a.fz.de: Team A goal mouth normal vector Z.
Team A left corner kick X.
Team A left corner kick Y.
Team A left corner kick Z.
Team A right corner kick X.
Team A right corner kick Y.
Team A right corner kick Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.x1.de: Team B goal corner 1 world X.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.y1.de: Team B goal corner 1 world Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.z1.de: Team B goal corner 1 world Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.x2.de: Team B goal corner 2 world X.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.y2.de: Team B goal corner 2 world Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.z2.de: Team B goal corner 2 world Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.fx.de: Team B goal mouth normal vector X.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.fy.de: Team B goal mouth normal vector Y.
screen.nmbct-football.field.goal_b.fz.de: Team B goal mouth normal vector Z.
Team B left corner kick X.
Team B left corner kick Y.
Team B left corner kick Z.
Team B right corner kick X.
Team B right corner kick Y.
Team B right corner kick Z.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_a.gk_y: Team A goalkeeper yaw on spawn.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_a.gk_p: Team A goalkeeper pitch on spawn.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_b.gk_y: Team B goalkeeper yaw on spawn.
screen.nmbct-football.field.spawn_b.gk_p: Team B goalkeeper pitch on spawn.
command.nmbct-football.match.phase.penal: Match is not tied; cannot start penalty shootout
